alphaCategories.name: Live Data Advantage
alphaCategories.description: SEC EDGAR polls hourly. ASX MarkitDigital and GlobeNewswire poll every 2-12 hours. Free frontier LLMs have training cutoffs measured in months or years and cannot retrieve corporate filings made this week, today, or this hour. Any prompt involving recent earnings dates, current M&A activity, or this quarter's dividends is automatic high differentiation.

alphaCategories.name: Cross-Jurisdiction Schema Normalization
alphaCategories.description: Raw SEC EDGAR, ASX MarkitDigital, and GlobeNewswire APIs return completely different schemas, pagination styles, identifier systems (CIK, ASX code, TSX ticker), and date formats. This tool normalises all four into a single typed schema: { company, ticker, isin, jurisdiction, event_type, event_date, announcement_date, source, source_url, details, is_amendment, amends_id }. No free alternative provides this — Yahoo Finance and Alpha Vantage cover US earnings dates only, with no UK/CA/AU events, no amendment resolution, and no cross-jurisdiction filtering.

alphaCategories.name: US Historical Depth via EDGAR Submissions Pagination
alphaCategories.description: The SEC EDGAR submissions API stores all 8-K filings for every public US company back to the early 1990s, paginated through filings.files[]. fetch_historical_events walks these pages to retrieve arbitrary date ranges up to 200 events per call. No free alternative provides programmatic access to 30 years of corporate event history without a Bloomberg Terminal or Refinitiv subscription.

alphaCategories.name: Amendment Detection and Linking
alphaCategories.description: 8-K/A filings are corrections to previously filed 8-Ks. Every event carries is_amendment: boolean and amends_id: string | null linking the amendment back to the original event by matching company + event_type + items. This lets agents reason about which original events have been restated — a critical signal for earnings analysis that no free tool normalises.

alphaCategories.name: Multi-Dimension Event Screening
alphaCategories.description: search_events supports simultaneous filtering by event_type[], jurisdiction[], from_date, and to_date. This lets agents build corporate calendars, screen for all M&A activity in a jurisdiction window, or find all dividends across AU+CA in the last 7 days. Bloomberg and Refinitiv provide this — at $10,000-24,000/yr — but no free programmatic alternative does.

crossToolOpportunities.combinedInsight: Corporate earnings announcements cluster around Fed FOMC windows. Combining central-bank-intel stance signals with corporate earnings dates reveals which companies are reporting into hawkish vs dovish Fed cycles — a known earnings volatility predictor.
crossToolOpportunities.examplePrompt: Are there major US earnings announcements scheduled in the week following the next FOMC meeting?

crossToolOpportunities.combinedInsight: Dividend yield compression is strongly correlated with yield curve flattening. Cross-referencing recent dividend announcements with the current 2s10s spread surfaces companies whose dividend policy is diverging from the macro rate environment.
crossToolOpportunities.examplePrompt: Show me recent Australian dividend announcements alongside the current AU yield curve spread.

upstreamGaps.gap: Bloomberg Terminal and Refinitiv Datastream provide corporate actions data but have no agent-callable JSON API — they are GUI products requiring human operators.
upstreamGaps.howToolFills: All five tools return structured JSON responses via MCP. An AI agent can call get_company_events('AAPL') and receive typed, filterable data in one call.

upstreamGaps.gap: Yahoo Finance and Alpha Vantage free tiers cover US earnings announcement dates only. No free alternative covers dividends, splits, M&A, or non-US jurisdictions.
upstreamGaps.howToolFills: Covers all four event types across US, UK, Canada, and Australia in a single unified schema.

upstreamGaps.gap: SEDAR+ (Canada) and FCA NSM (UK) have no confirmed free public API — SEDAR+ has bot protection and the FCA NSM requires S3/auth credentials.
upstreamGaps.howToolFills: Uses GlobeNewswire RSS feeds for CA and UK as verified working public proxies with real ticker, ISIN, and company data. Limitation is disclosed.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: What were Apple's most recent quarterly earnings filings from SEC EDGAR?
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Free LLMs have stale training data. AAPL's most recent 8-K (2026-04-30) is not in any LLM's training set.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: An analyst building an earnings calendar needs current filing dates, not training-set estimates.

freeBaseline.response: ChatGPT returns Apple's 2023-era earnings dates from training data, missing the 2025 and 2026 filings entirely.
freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Tool returns 2026-04-30 (Q2 FY2026) with accession number and direct SEC filing URL.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Are there any M&A announcements from Canadian companies in the last 24 hours?
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Free LLMs cannot access live GlobeNewswire Canada feed data.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: M&A deal monitoring for a Canadian equity portfolio requires same-day awareness.

freeBaseline.response: ChatGPT cannot answer — it has no access to today's news feed.
freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Tool polls GlobeNewswire Canada hourly and returns classified merger_acquisition events with TSX tickers and ISIN codes.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Show me all dividend announcements from Australian ASX-listed companies in the last 7 days.
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Free LLMs have no access to ASX Market Announcements data from this week.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: Portfolio income tracking for Australian equities.

freeBaseline.response: ChatGPT cannot answer — no access to ASX data from the last 7 days.
freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Tool returns ASX-sourced dividend events with company name, ASX code, and announcement date.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Compare corporate events for BHP over the last 30 days — what has the company announced?
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: BHP files on both ASX and SEC. No free LLM has access to either feed from this month.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: BHP is a major dual-listed company. Investors need both ASX and US filings in one view.

freeBaseline.response: ChatGPT returns stale BHP news from training data — misses the quarterly activities report and board update filed in May 2026.
freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Tool retrieves BHP announcements from ASX MarkitDigital with correct dates and document keys.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Get JPMorgan's full corporate event history from 2015 to 2016.
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Free LLMs have no access to the EDGAR submissions pagination API and cannot retrieve dated lists of 8-K filings.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: Quant researchers backtesting earnings reaction models need historical filing dates.

freeBaseline.response: ChatGPT can name JPM's approximate quarterly earnings dates from memory but cannot provide actual 8-K filing dates, items, accession numbers, or the 79-event complete filing log.
freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Tool returns 79 classified 8-K events with dates, item codes, and direct SEC archive URLs.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Search for all merger and acquisition announcements across US, Canada, and Australia in the last 90 days.
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: No free LLM has real-time cross-jurisdiction M&A screening capability.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: Cross-border deal monitoring for an M&A advisory or event-driven hedge fund.

freeBaseline.response: ChatGPT lists major M&A deals it knows from training but misses the last 90 days of activity and cannot distinguish SEC EDGAR vs ASX vs GlobeNewswire sources.
freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Tool returns classified merger_acquisition events from all three jurisdictions with source attribution.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Has Apple filed any 8-K/A amendments in the last year and what do they correct?
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: No free LLM can query SEC EDGAR for 8-K/A filings and link them to their original 8-K.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: Auditors and analysts need to know when companies have restated prior disclosures.

freeBaseline.response: ChatGPT cannot answer — it has no access to EDGAR filing history.
freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Tool returns events with is_amendment: true flagged, and amends_id linking to the original filing where resolvable.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: What is the current health of the data pipeline — are all four jurisdictions polling successfully?
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Operational state of a live data pipeline is completely outside any LLM's knowledge.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: Before relying on the tool for time-sensitive decisions, a user should verify data freshness.

freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Tool returns last_polled_at, status (ok/error/never), events_indexed, and last_event_date per source.

candidatePromptPool.prompt: Find all recent corporate events for Fairfax Financial Holdings.
candidatePromptPool.whyFreeCannotAnswer: Fairfax Financial's recent announcements are not in any LLM training set.
candidatePromptPool.realWorldConsequence: Canadian equity investor monitoring a specific holding.

freeBaseline.response: ChatGPT returns general background on Fairfax but cannot retrieve recent filings.
freeBaseline.whyItBeatsFree: Tool returns GlobeNewswire CA event with ticker=FFH, isin=CA3039011026, classification, and source URL.

level2.upstreamComparison: EDGAR submissions API confirmed: AAPL CIK 0000320193, 2026-04-30 8-K items [2.02, 9.01] (earnings). Tool returns matching event classified as earnings. Filing URL resolves to correct SEC archive folder.
issues: LSE_RNS events_indexed = 0: GlobeNewswire UK country feed returns empty channel at time of testing. UK coverage is sparse and disclosed as a proxy limitation, not a bug.

latencyAudit.schemaCompleteness: 5/5 tools have complete outputSchema with all fields typed

failures.rootCause: items field was string not array in EDGAR EFTS response
failures.fix: Changed classifier to accept string[] and join before processing

failures.rootCause: ASX API path was /company/ (404), correct path is /companies/
FCA NSM returned 403; SEDAR+ domain unresolvable
failures.fix: Replaced both with GlobeNewswire country RSS feeds (UK + Canada)

failures.rootCause: search_events default from_date was 30 days, Apple earnings at 34 days returned 0

showcasePrompts: What were Apple's most recent quarterly earnings filings from SEC EDGAR?
Show me all dividend announcements from ASX-listed companies in the last 7 days.
Search for merger and acquisition events across US, Canada, and Australia in the last 90 days.
Get JPMorgan's full 8-K filing history from 2015 to 2016.
Compare corporate events for BHP over the last 30 days.
Are there any M&A announcements from Canadian companies in the last 24 hours?
Has any US company filed an 8-K/A amendment this week and what does it correct?
Find all recent corporate events for Fairfax Financial Holdings.
What is the current pipeline health — are all four jurisdictions polling successfully?
Screen for all earnings events across US and Australian companies announced in the last 30 days.
knownLimitations: UK: GlobeNewswire country/United-Kingdom feed is sparse. FCA NSM requires S3 authentication (403). UK coverage is best-effort.
Canada: SEDAR+ domain (efts.sedarplus.ca) does not resolve. sedarplus.ca has bot protection. GlobeNewswire Canada is a verified working proxy with TSX tickers and ISIN codes.
Exchange-validated settlement data (DTCC/CREST/CHESS): not implemented. These are commercial settlement systems with no free public API.
Real-time intraday corrections: not implemented. Amendment flagging covers 8-K/A form detection and post-insert linking, not live correction streams.
Historical depth >30 days: US only (EDGAR). ASX MarkitDigital returns ~20 recent announcements per company. GlobeNewswire feeds return ~20 most recent items.
